# gvkey_list.txt

## Description
Plain text file containing a list of unique Compustat GVKEY identifiers, one per line. This file is used as input for downloading Compustat data and contains all GVKEYs that have matching Capital IQ company identifiers in the transcript data.

## Generated by
`src/pre_query/compustat/get_gvkey.py`

## Variables

### gvkey
Each line contains a single Compustat GVKEY identifier. String type. Global Company Key used in Compustat database to uniquely identify companies across time and corporate actions. No header row.
